issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as rate limits or certificate renewal failures.
The instructions assume a Debian-based Linux environment with apt and systemd, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: nginx-domain-cert
scenarios.rationale: Both responses correctly invoke certbot --nginx with -d flags; treatment additionally checks the certbot.timer systemd unit and runs certbot renew --dry-run as documented.

scenarios.name: traefik-docker-tls
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact certificatesresolvers.le.acme.* CLI flags and acme.json volume per skill; baseline knows Traefik+ACME conceptually but mis-names flags.
